way.sql: (SELECT ST_TRANSFORM(ST_POINTONSURFACE(geom), 3857) FROM ST_DUMP(ST_TRANSFORM(way, 4326)) ORDER BY ST_AREA(CAST(geom AS GEOGRAPHY)) DESC LIMIT 1)

cluster_min_ref.sql: MIN(ref) OVER (PARTITION BY stripped_ref, visible_name, cid)

args.sql: ST_COLLECT(way) FILTER(WHERE ref IS NOT DISTINCT FROM cluster_min_ref)
